title: Crispy Golden Croatian Lamb Kidney Skewers
description: A floral and tender Croatian dish featuring lamb kidney, perfect for a weeknight dinner, with an ovo-vegetarian friendly twist by using vegetable oil for deep-frying, and this recipe does not include any eggs
instructions: In a large bowl, mix together flour, paprika, garlic powder, salt, and black pepper.
Add the sliced lamb kidney to the bowl and toss to coat evenly with the flour mixture.
Heat the vegetable oil in a deep frying pan to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
Using a skewer, thread 3-4 pieces of the coated lamb kidney.
Carefully place the skewers in the hot oil and deep-fry for 3-4 minutes on each side, until golden brown.
Remove the skewers from the oil and place them on a paper towel lined plate to drain excess oil.
Sprinkle the chopped parsley over the skewers and serve with a squeeze of lemon juice.
Repeat the frying process with the remaining lamb kidney pieces.
Serve the crispy golden lamb kidney skewers hot and enjoy.
